app_release_notes: v0.16.57 - New Load Card tab shows your current winning load's full recipe and build sheet at a glance. Plus, in the Libraries page you can now open a Load Card or Pocket Card for any saved load - each Pocket Card re-solves its dope from that load's own velocity and bullet.

windows.app_release_notes: v0.16.57 - New Load Card tab shows your current winning load's full recipe and build sheet at a glance. Plus, in the Libraries page you can now open a Load Card or Pocket Card for any saved load - each Pocket Card re-solves its dope from that load's own velocity and bullet.
